method: Explore agents = leads; every verdict re-Read personally with file:line (evidence-discipline). Read-only: zero source edits, zero deletions.

auditScorecard.note: ~half the audit's headline findings did not survive raw-file verification

resources.name: max:check / max:review — 'calls nonexistent critic agent'
resources.evidence: check.md:8 subagent_type="max:review-critic"; review.md:21-23; dev.md:664; tech-debt.md:189 — all use max:review-critic (exists). Bare 'critic' appears only as prose/role-label.

resources.name: max skills — 'empty descriptions'
resources.evidence: plugin.json:3 declares 27 skills; 27 SKILL.md on disk; max-modernize:3 & max-powershell-cyrillic:3 have full descriptions. 'bare' in runtime listing = render artifact, not empty file. 0/27 empty.

resources.name: ios-design-review
resources.evidence: SKILL.md:5 'audit for iOS apps on real hardware'

resources.name: ios-qa
resources.evidence: SKILL.md:783-785 (personal Read) macOS/devicectl from Xcode, iPhone via USB, Xcode+Swift

resources.name: claude-reflect (4 hooks)
resources.evidence: hooks.json:9,20,31,42 bare python3, no commandWindows. BUT this session: PreCompact check_learnings.py completed successfully + SessionStart reminder ran → python3 resolves here. Not dead; fragile (no Windows fallback).

resources.name: max-download-prod-to-local
resources.evidence: SKILL.md:32-34 'Не хардкодь прод-хост'; PROD_HOST=root@$(jq -r .server_host deploy-config.json); :38 placeholder root@<prod-ip>; keys via ssh from .env.prod :78,:93, never echoed :84, .env gitignore-checked :89. No literal IP/secret. Real issue: project skill in universal marketplace.

resources.name: e2e
resources.evidence: Generic command; SellCoach parts guarded/skippable e2e.md:314,:665. Not a leak.

resources.name: claude-mem hooks (PostToolUse matcher *)
resources.evidence: hooks.json:50 matcher '*' → login-shell+node worker per tool-call (timeout 120); also PreToolUse/Read:63, Setup:6, UserPromptSubmit:37, Stop:78. NOTE: owner's memory backbone — narrow matcher, not remove.

resources.name: security-guidance (Stop+edit+commit LLM review)
resources.evidence: hooks.json Stop:81-92 asyncRewake + UserPromptSubmit:15 + PostToolUse Edit|Write:25-34 + Bash git commit/push:35-79; llm.py:131 model claude-opus-4-7, :166 posts to api.anthropic.com. LLM diff-review on every stop/edit/commit — cost+latency+diffs to API.

resources.name: claude-mem 13.8.0 (stale duplicate)
resources.evidence: 496.8 MB measured; installed_plugins.json:285 active=13.8.1. Stale dir → cleanly removable.

resources.name: temp_git_* + *.bak leftovers
resources.evidence: temp_git_* 2.5 MB (7 dirs) + 2 .bak 0.01 MB. Cleanly removable. Total cleanly-deletable today ~0.5 GB (incl. 13.8.0).

resources.name: darwin+linux native binaries under plugins
resources.evidence: 238.3 MB (darwin 120.0 + linux 118.4) wrong-OS bins; needs npm prune/rebuild (medium risk), not free delete.

resources.name: context7 (registered 3x)
resources.evidence: Agent-lead (not personally re-Read — .claude.json holds plaintext keys). 3 registrations. Ф3 consolidation: keep global+key, drop project+plugin.

resources.name: playwright (registered 2x)
resources.evidence: Agent-lead. 2 registrations load browser_* toolset twice. Ф3: keep one.

resources.name: max plugin — 27 skills + 18 commands (verified healthy)
resources.evidence: 27/27 SKILL.md non-empty descriptions; 18/18 commands non-empty. Control group; specific project-scoped members itemized separately (max-download-prod-to-local, slide-parity).

openDecisions.note: Recommendations only — actual decisions collected via AskUserQuestion after review.

blessedWinners.codeReview: built-in code-review (retire sc-refactor/comprehensive/ponytail overlaps; keep max:review for heavy passes)
blessedWinners.memory: claude-mem (persistent) + pick ONE of claude-reflect/dream (rec: claude-reflect)
blessedWinners.lsp: cclsp (loaded, multi-lang); retire serena until reconnected
blessedWinners.dedup: drywall (detect) + max:dedup (drift) + built-in simplify (apply); drop one of code-simplifier/sc-cleanup
blessedWinners.browser: claude-in-chrome (interactive) + playwright (headless); chrome-devtools only if remote-debugging
blessedWinners.mcpDedup: context7 keep global+key; playwright keep one

latencyHooks.claude-mem: narrow PostToolUse matcher or keep with known cost (owner memory — not remove)
latencyHooks.security-guidance: keep / narrow events / disable (LLM review on stop+edit+commit)

openDecisions.deadOnWindows: 5 iOS gstack skills — remove locally or tag platform=mac and hide
openDecisions.securityFlag: C:\Users\User\.claude.json holds plaintext API keys (perplexity/you.com/z.ai/context7) — standard CC store, local/user-owned; owner decision, not a Castellyn regression, values not reproduced
